verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once I was straying In sin's dark valley, No hope within could I see; They searched through Heaven And found a Savior To save a poor lost soul like me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh what a Savior, oh hallelujah, His heart was broken on Calvary; His hands were nail-scarred His side was riven, He gave His life blood for even me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He left the Father, with all His riches, With calmness sweet and serene, Came down from Heaven And gave His life blood, To make the vilest sinner clean.
